mapper.select:
SELECT ti.file_name, ss.single_id, ss.slide_id, ss.thumb_url, ss.category_id, fc.organ_en, fc.organ_name, fs.group_code, fs.wax_code, fs.animal_code, fs.gender_flag, fs.initiate_by, su.user_name as initiate_name, fs.initiate_time FROM fr_single_slide ss LEFT JOIN fr_slide fs ON ss.slide_id = fs.slide_id LEFT JOIN fr_category fc ON ss.category_id = fc.category_id left join tb_image ti on fs.image_id = ti.image_id left join sys_user su on fs.initiate_by=su.user_id
fs.special_id = #{specialId} and fs.process_flag = '2'
and ti.file_name like concat('%',#{fileName},'%')
and su.user_name like concat('%',#{initiateName},'%')
and ss.category_id =#{categoryId}
AND date_format(fs.initiate_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{initiateTimeParams.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fs.initiate_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{initiateTimeParams.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by fs.initiate_time desc

select fsl.special_name, tt.topic_name, ti.file_name, ts.name trialType, ts.name_en, fs.gender_flag, fsl.color_type, fs.group_code, ti.format, fc.organ_name, if(fss.abnormal_status='1','未见异常病理变化','') abnormalStatus, fss.thumb_url from fr_single_slide fss left join fr_slide fs on fss.slide_id = fs.slide_id left join fr_special fsl on fs.special_id = fsl.special_id left join tb_topic tt on fsl.topic_id = tt.topic_id left join tb_image ti on fs.image_id = ti.image_id left join fr_category fc on fss.category_id = fc.category_id left join tb_species ts on fsl.species_id = ts.species_id and ts.organization_id = fsl.organization_id where fss.single_id = #{id}

select fsl.special_name, tt.topic_name, ti.file_name, ts.name trialType, ts.name_en, fs.gender_flag, fsl.color_type, fs.group_code, ti.format, fc.organ_name, fss.thumb_url from fr_single_slide fss left join fr_slide fs on fss.slide_id = fs.slide_id left join fr_special fsl on fs.special_id = fsl.special_id left join tb_topic tt on fsl.topic_id = tt.topic_id left join tb_image ti on fs.image_id = ti.image_id left join fr_category fc on fss.category_id = fc.category_id left join tb_species ts on fsl.species_id = ts.species_id and ts.organization_id = fsl.organization_id where fss.single_id = #{id}
mapper.sql: s.slide_id, s.special_id, s.image_id, s.group_code, s.wax_code, s.animal_code, s.gender_flag, s.organs, s.process_flag, s.check_status, s.check_by, s.check_time, s.initiate_by, s.initiate_time, s.del_flag, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, m.image_id, m.thumb_url, m.image_path, m.format, m.width, m.height, m.source_lens, m.resolution_x, m.resolution_y, m.source_lens, m.image_name, ss.single_id, ss.single_id as singleSlideId, ss.thumb_url as singleThumbUrl, ss.category_id, ss.description, ss.forecast_status, ss.diagnosis_status
mapper.select:
select from fr_single_slide as ss left join fr_slide s on ss.slide_id = s.slide_id left join tb_image m on m.image_id = s.image_id
ss.single_id = #{singleId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
